name: Memos
description: Easily capture and share your great thoughts
compose:
name: slashnode-memos
services:
  main:
    image: neosmemo/memos:0.29.1
    container_name: memos
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MEMOS_MODE: prod
      MEMOS_PORT: '5230'
    volumes:
      - main_data:/var/opt/memos
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5230:5230
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  main_data:
    name: slashnode-memos_main_data
